title: What's new in Cloud Run
summary: Google Cloud Tech announces new Cloud Run capabilities for deploying AI agents and inference workloads with serverless features. The session covers scaling applications, reducing operational overhead, and addressing next-generation AI-driven development needs.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session covers new Cloud Run capabilities aimed at deploying AI agents and inference workloads using serverless features. It addresses how applications scale and how operational overhead is reduced for next-generation AI-driven development. The concepts span serverless deployment, local inference, scaling, and AI agents.
